name: Black Diamond Therapeutics, Inc.
business: Black Diamond Therapeutics is a clinical-stage oncology company developing MasterKey therapies that target families of oncogenic mutations in patients with cancer. Its lead program, silevertinib, is a brain-penetrant EGFR inhibitor being studied in non-small cell lung cancer and glioblastoma. The company also outlicensed a RAF inhibitor, BDTX-4933, to Servier.

exposures.sentence: We are a clinical-stage oncology company developing MasterKey therapies that target families of oncogenic mutations in patients with cancer.

catalysts.event: Initiate randomized Phase 2 trial of silevertinib in newly diagnosed EGFR altered GBM
catalysts.sentence: We plan to initiate a randomized Phase 2 trial of silevertinib in newly diagnosed patients with EGFR altered glioblastoma (GBM) in the second quarter of 2026.

catalysts.event: Present updated Phase 2 NSCLC results including DOR and PFS data
catalysts.sentence: We plan to present updated results from the Phase 2 NSCLC trial, including preliminary duration of response (DOR) and progression-free survival (PFS) data in the frontline setting (43 patients) as well as updated clinical results in the recurrent setting (83 patients), at a medical meeting in the second quarter of 2026.

catalysts.event: Interim PFS analysis for GBM Phase 2 trial
catalysts.sentence: The primary endpoint of the trial will be PFS (RANO by BICR), with a planned futility analysis, and an interim PFS analysis anticipated in the first half of 2028.
